children.heading: Provisions of other laws
children.label: a Provisions of other laws
children.text: Any action by any Federal department or agency under shall be subject to such judicial review as may otherwise be provided by law for similar action taken by any such department or agency on other grounds.section 6104 of this title

children.heading: Provisions of chapter 7 of title 5; reviewable agency discretion
children.label: b Provisions of chapter 7 of title 5; reviewable agency discretion
children.text: In the case of any action by any Federal department or agency under which is not otherwise subject to judicial review, any person aggrieved (including any State or political subdivision thereof and any agency of either) may obtain judicial review of such action in accordance with the provisions of chapter 7 of title 5. For purposes of this subsection, any such action shall not be considered committed to unreviewable agency discretion within the meaning of section 701(a)(2) of such title.section 6104 of this title
